variants: Haruto Morita currently resides in Everbrook Hollow, having been born in Petrel's Bluff. He is recognized for his noteworthy contributions to his field, having received the Lightward Sapphire Ribbon. In addition to his professional pursuits, he is an enthusiastic member of the Harlequin Dancers Society, where his passion for dance flourishes.
